item.title: How bad will drought be in Texas? Rio Grande Valley farmers are bracing for the worst.
item.description: The Rio Grande Valley typically grows between 60 to 80 million acres of fresh produce annually, but that has declined over the years due to drought.
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: Screwworm outbreak hits vacant Texas congressional district, as leading candidates scramble to assist
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: Government watchdog says detention center wasted up to $11.5 million before detainees arrived

item.title: An unprecedented data center boom means new challenges for Texas. Find out what’s planned near you.

item.title: Three new cases of screwworm confirmed in Texas; A&M leader tasked as federal adviser

item.title: Balcones Canyonlands wildlife refuge, home to endangered songbird, adds more than 600 acres
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: TribCast: How big of a threat is screwworm?
item.description: In this week’s episode, the TribCast team talks to Phillip Kaufman, head of Texas A&M’s entomology department, and Josh Winegarner from the Texas Cattle Feeders Association about the arrival of screwworm in Texas.
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: New pro-Talarico super PAC wants to give GOP voters “permission to defect”
item.description: Moment of Truth PAC, launched by a bipartisan group of campaign operatives, is aiming to spend a staggering $62 million. Much of it would be used to spotlight Ken Paxton’s controversies.
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: The Tribune introduces 11 summer fellows
item.description: Our fellowship program offers college students and recent graduates hands-on professional experience in one the country’s most innovative news organizations.
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: Elected Officials Directory
item.description: To help Texans know more about their representatives, we’ve gathered the bios, contact information and more for the occupants of the state’s highest offices.

item.title: Government Salaries Explorer
item.description: Review the compensation of hundreds of thousands of state and municipal employees in Texas.

item.title: Texas Public Schools Explorer
item.description: Review enrollment trends, demographics, teacher experience, pay and outcomes for all schools, and more.
